intermediate-algebra-2e:c5s4.reason: Polynomial division extends prior division skills.

intermediate-algebra-2e:c6s5.reason: Polynomial equations use factoring and equation solving.

intermediate-algebra-2e:c7s6.reason: Rational inequalities combine rationals with inequality solving.

intermediate-algebra-2e:c8s8.reason: Complex numbers extend the number system beyond real radicals.
